metadata.description: Claude Code productivity toolkit - plan review with OpenAI Codex, and more

plugins.name: codex-plan-improver
plugins.description: Automatic plan review via OpenAI Codex CLI. Intercepts ExitPlanMode and sends plans through iterative Codex review before presenting to the user.

plugins.name: feature-delivery
plugins.description: End-to-end feature delivery workflow: requirements gathering, spec editing, status dashboard, and implementation orchestration with parallel subagents

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: Create custom hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors using markdown rule files with regex pattern matching

plugins.name: session-learner
plugins.description: Analyze conversation for friction signals (corrections, repeated instructions, deviations) and interactively update project documentation (.claude/rules/, CLAUDE.md) with verified learnings

plugins.name: namesmith
plugins.description: Business name discovery: generates 15-20 candidates, filters them with a challenger sub-agent, then checks domain availability via Instant Domain Search MCP

plugins.name: scribe
plugins.description: Audio/video transcription pipeline with summary, news extraction, and custom processing. Sources: YouTube URLs (yt-dlp) or local files (any format ffmpeg handles). Backed by ElevenLabs Scribe.
